items.title: [Google Play 差评] ★1 another disaster pull session why do we
items.summary: another disaster pull session why do we need to lost twice and not just make 50/50 your ten pulls is expensive than main stream games but u have lower rate of getting banner characters. the game is good though outside of its very predatory gacha.
items.author: Vermy Balasuela

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 I've sunk over 70 hours into this game j
items.summary: I've sunk over 70 hours into this game just THIS month and That's just on my phone! I'm definitely hooked. The gameplay is great, so many team comps and strategies to work with. The art is also great, the character designs are cool and elegant and the boss designs *chef's kiss* very Eldritch horror. OH but the story, the story is amazing I can't recommend this game enough.
items.author: Mario Sapien

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 说实话，这个游戏我玩了大概快一年了，真的挺喜欢的，画风精美，只是剧情越过越难，我
items.summary: 说实话，这个游戏我玩了大概快一年了，真的挺喜欢的，画风精美，只是剧情越过越难，我的角色等级大部分都是60等级，但怎么玩都没法一次不死过关，希望能多送点角色起灵或者多出点有关的奖励机制，不然真的很难通关，我在9-1忘却篇卡了很久，真的角色要是不是满命很难玩
items.author: 半夜来事真菌

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 Slay the spire the gacha game. Absolutel
items.summary: Slay the spire the gacha game. Absolutely addicting game, if you want an mc that has personality that fights eldritch horrors, this game is for you.
